case_title: THOI TRUONG VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY TRUONG, THOI AS TO DEFENDANT GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORPORATION DBA GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORPORATION DBA GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DIANE JOHNSON--CREDIT SALES MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRUONG, THOI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORPORATION DBA GE CAPITAL RETAIL BANK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
